name: Floom Starter
description: A broad local-first starter portfolio of curated agent skills.

profiles.name: Core
profiles.description: Skill discovery, task framing, and project onboarding for everyone.

profiles.name: Dev
profiles.description: Code review, tests, security, browser checks, and repo analysis.

profiles.name: Writing
profiles.description: Brand voice, concise drafts, documents, and presentations.

profiles.name: Research
profiles.description: Source-aware briefs, citations, enterprise search, and PDF extraction.

profiles.name: Marketing
profiles.description: Landing pages, positioning, customer synthesis, and brand voice.

profiles.name: Sales
profiles.description: Outbound, customer context, and sales data analysis.

profiles.name: Ops
profiles.description: Meetings, SOPs, onboarding, and file organization.

profiles.name: Founder
profiles.description: Strategy briefs, customer learning, landing pages, and decisions.

profiles.name: Data
profiles.description: Spreadsheets, PDFs, financial QA, and table extraction.

profiles.name: Design
profiles.description: Visual QA and browser-based implementation checks.

skills.name: Local Find Skills
skills.description: Search the locally installed Floom starter skill index and choose the smallest relevant skill set for the current task.

skills.name: Task Brief
skills.description: Turn a fuzzy request into a clear task brief with goal, constraints, decisions, and verification steps.

skills.name: Meeting Notes To Actions
skills.description: Convert messy meeting notes into decisions, owners, deadlines, and follow-up tasks.

skills.name: Research Brief
skills.description: Produce a source-aware research brief with claims, evidence, caveats, and next checks.

skills.name: Customer Interview Synthesis
skills.description: Turn interview notes into pains, jobs-to-be-done, objections, quotes, and product implications.

skills.name: Landing Page Review
skills.description: Review a landing page for clarity, conversion, trust, information hierarchy, and launch readiness.

skills.name: Outbound Email Draft
skills.description: Draft concise outbound emails from target context, offer, proof, and desired next step.

skills.name: Ops SOP Builder
skills.description: Convert a recurring workflow into a practical SOP with steps, checks, owners, and escalation rules.

skills.name: Visual QA Review
skills.description: Review a UI screenshot or page for layout breakage, visual hierarchy, spacing, text fit, and interaction clarity.

skills.name: Brand Voice Writer
skills.description: Make agent output sound like the team.

skills.name: Pragmatic PR Reviewer
skills.description: Review code changes for launch-risk issues.

skills.name: Project Onboarding
skills.description: A starter workflow for bringing an agent into a project.

skills.name: Citation Check
skills.description: Comprehensive citation management for academic research. Search Google Scholar and PubMed for papers, extract accurate metadata, validate citations, and generate properly formatted BibTeX entries. This skill should be used when you need to find papers, verify citation information, convert DOIs to BibTeX, or ensure reference accuracy in scientific writing.

skills.name: Offer Letter Generator
skills.description: Word document manipulation with python-docx - handling split placeholders, headers/footers, nested tables

skills.name: Organize Files
skills.description: "Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks"

skills.name: PDF Excel Diff
skills.description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.

skills.name: Sales Pivot Analysis
skills.description: "ALWAYS use this skill instead of the Read tool for PDF files. The Read tool cannot extract PDF tables properly. Use this skill when: (1) Reading ANY PDF file, (2) Extracting tables from PDFs, (3) Converting PDF tables to pandas DataFrames, (4) Processing multi-page PDFs"

skills.name: PDF Text Parser
skills.description: "Guide for parsing structured text input files."

skills.name: PPT Excel Table
skills.description: "Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. When Claude needs to work with spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv, etc) for: (1) Creating new spreadsheets with formulas and formatting, (2) Reading or analyzing data, (3) Modify existing spreadsheets while preserving formulas, (4) Data analysis and visualization in spreadsheets, or (5) Recalculating formulas"

skills.name: Python Testing
skills.description: Write and evaluate effective Python tests using pytest. Use when writing tests, reviewing test code, debugging test failures, or improving test coverage. Covers test design, fixtures, parameterization, mocking, and async testing.

skills.name: Security Review
skills.description: Comprehensive security engineering skill for application security, penetration testing, security architecture, and compliance auditing. Includes security assessment tools, threat modeling, crypto implementation, and security automation. Use when designing security architecture, conducting penetration tests, implementing cryptography, or performing security audits.

skills.name: Browser Performance Debugging
skills.description: "VERIFY your changes work. Measure performance, CLS. Use BEFORE and AFTER making changes to confirm fixes. Includes ready-to-run scripts: measure-cls.ts, detect-flicker.ts"

skills.name: GitHub Repo Analytics
skills.description: "The gh CLI is GitHub's official command line tool for interacting with GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, and more. When needs to interact with GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, and more, use this skill."

skills.name: Video Filler Word Remover
skills.description: "Process filler word annotations to generate video edit lists. Use when working with timestamp annotations for removing speech disfluencies (um, uh, like, you know) from audio/video content."

skills.name: Video Silence Remover
skills.description: Extract audio from video files to WAV format. Use when you need to analyze audio from video, prepare audio for energy calculation, or convert video audio to standard format for processing.

skills.name: Video Tutorial Indexer
skills.description: Transcribe video to timestamped text using Whisper tiny model (pre-installed).

skills.name: PPT Reference Formatting
skills.description: "Presentation creation, editing, and analysis. When Claude needs to work with presentations (.pptx files) for: (1) Creating new presentations, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with layouts, (4) Adding comments or speaker notes, or any other presentation tasks"

skills.name: Enterprise Search
skills.description: Multi-hop evidence search + structured extraction over enterprise artifact datasets (docs/chats/meetings/PRs/URLs). Strong disambiguation to prevent cross-product leakage; returns JSON-ready entities plus evidence pointers.

skills.name: Financial Modeling QA
skills.description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.
